arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'mistakes', Luiz transfer, injuries - Every word Unai Emery said in Juventus press conference - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: "I like this format a lot in the Champions League because I think a lot of teams can have more and more options to try to correct some mistakes by playing eight matches. "But normally at the end, the matches played in this competition and the first round of Europe, I think more or less maybe there can be some surprises, but usually the better teams will be there."

arts.ttl: Decision made on Douglas Luiz’s return to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Aston Villa fans eagerly anticipating a reunion with Douglas Luiz during Juventus’ Champions League clash at Villa Park have been left disappointed, as the Brazilian midfielder has been omitted from the Italian side’s travelling squad due to injury, as reported by Birmingham Live. Luiz joined Juventus in a high-profile €50 million transfer this summer, signing […] The post Decision made on Douglas Luiz’s return to Aston Villa appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: "Now with Douglas Luiz playing there, I know he’s in a difficult moment but he’s a really good player. Pau Torres has revealed he's spoken with Douglas Luiz after the midfielder's struggles at Juventus following his summer transfer from Aston Villa.
